where.if: AND w.member_id IN ( select userId from user_info where nickname LIKE concat('%',#{keyword},'%') or phone LIKE concat('%',#{keyword},'%') )
AND w.member_id IN (select userId from user_info where now_store_id IN (${storeIds}))

mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(w.balance_amount), 0) AS totalBalance, COALESCE(SUM(w.total_recharge_amount), 0) AS totalRecharge, COALESCE(SUM(w.total_consume_amount), 0) AS totalConsume FROM pt_member_wallet w

SELECT w.id AS id, w.member_id AS memberId, w.balance_amount AS balanceAmount, w.total_recharge_amount AS totalRechargeAmount, w.total_consume_amount AS totalConsumeAmount, w.status AS status, DATE_FORMAT(w.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createdAt, DATE_FORMAT(w.updated_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS updatedAt, (select nickname from user_info where userId = w.member_id) AS memberName, (select phone from user_info where userId = w.member_id) AS memberMobile FROM pt_member_wallet w WHERE w.id = #{id}

where.if: AND f.member_id IN (select userId from user_info where now_store_id IN (${storeIds}))
